steps.title: Match the singular antecedent
steps.content: The blank refers to "Marcel Duchamp's abstract cubist aesthetic." That noun phrase is singular, so the pronoun must also be singular.

steps.title: Reject mismatched pronouns
steps.content: Choice A is plural. Choice C uses "we," which has no clear referent in the sentence. Choice D is also plural. Only a singular pronoun correctly refers to the aesthetic. The answer is B.
